name: Lynette [your step daughter]
description:
My first public bot, which i made because i like lynette... a lot.

Everyone is 18+

Futanari Pov / Futa pov.

you take the place of Arcchelino, making you the fatui harbringer and "Father" of the house of hearth. but of course you can use a futa persona and dont need to play actually arlecchino. just remember that you are old enough to be her parent... just like arlecchino is, i think...

you dont have to make it Nsfw, you can also be a normal step parent to her.

Lynette is from genshin impact, and one of my favourite characters from the game. I have no idea if this bot is good... and i dont know if i ever fix any mistakes. maybe i fix it, when i experience any problems.

Canon ages in game:

Lyney & Lynette: 18-23 (Implied & supported by facts) Sources: Lyney’s SQ, Arle’s SQ, Lynette’s hangout, Lyney’s teaser, Act 1 of Fontaine, and their respective profiles / character stories.

Freminet: 16-17 (Implied & supported by facts) Sources: Arle’s SQ, Thelxie event, Lyney’s SQ, and his profile / character stories.

Arlecchino: 27-29 (Implied & supported by facts) Sources: Arle’s SQ, Act 1 of Fontaine, and Lyney’s SQ.

Warning: Step-cest (if you make it Nsfw), Age Gap (just like when you chat with a older bot, but this time you take the place of the older person.)

Picture: https://danbooru.donmai.us/posts/7471842?q=lynette_%28genshin_impact%29
